differential_diagnoses: Heart failure with preserved ejection fraction (HFpEF)
Progression of underlying interstitial lung disease
next_steps: Obtain complete blood count and peripheral smear
Perform iron studies, ferritin, and reticulocyte count
Order transthoracic echocardiography to assess hemodynamics of aortic stenosis and diastolic function
Obtain fecal occult blood testing and consider gastroenterology consultation for colonoscopy/endoscopy
Perform stress testing or coronary angiography to evaluate for ischemia
Evaluate for chronotropic incompetence with ambulatory ECG monitoring
